caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt with "CHECK 121" and a circular logo printed on the front, a dark baseball cap with an eagle emblem, and over-ear headphones sits in a podcast studio. He holds a microphone close to his mouth with his right hand, while a gold watch is visible on his wrist. In the background, a white wall features yellow stars and the word "HUSTLE" repeated. To his right, a screen displays the words "BOSS TALK 101" in large red and white letters. Overlaid on the bottom of the scene are logos for "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and "BOSS TALK 101." Across the frames, the man remains in the same seated position, shifting his facial expression slightly and adjusting his grip on the microphone as he speaks, though his overall posture and the background setting remain constant.
